task_completion.description: The Sygic GPS Navigation app is launched
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Sygic GPS Navigation app interface is visible on the screen, typically showing a map view or the main menu.

task_completion.description: The search or explore menu is accessed to browse POIs
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar is tapped or the explore menu is open, showing options to search for places or browse categories.

task_completion.description: The gas station category is selected from the Points of Interest (POI) options
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Fuel', 'Gas', 'Petrol', or 'Gas Station' category is selected or being browsed within the POI menu.

task_completion.description: A list of nearby gas stations is displayed
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list of nearby gas stations (e.g., Shell, Chevron, Arco, Mobil, Costco) is displayed on the screen as search results.

task_completion.description: The detail view of a specific gas station is open, showing its address and map preview
task_completion.visual_evidence: A detail view for a specific gas station is open. It must show the station's address, a map preview, distance (e.g., mi, km), and a 'Get directions' or 'Navigate' button.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Sygic GPS Navigation app
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual Sygic app interface (com.sygic.aura), not a web browser, text editor, or a different navigation app.

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI to browse and select the station
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows step-by-step GUI interaction (tapping search, selecting categories, tapping a result) rather than terminal commands bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: The gas station details are displayed within the app's native view
integrity.visual_evidence: The final detail view is clearly part of the Sygic app's native UI, featuring standard Sygic buttons and layout, not mocked or typed out.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses the real Sygic GPS Navigation app. Legitimate gas station brands in the results may include Shell, Chevron, Arco, 76, Mobil, Costco, Valero, Rotten Robbie, Exxon, Texaco, and Speedway. In the Sygic app, the gas station detail view contains a prominent blue 'Get directions' button at the bottom, distance displays (e.g., '5.7 km', 'mi'), and the station's address text.
